summary:
Claim: Nitrous oxide can cause paradoxical excitement in children.  
Evidence: - Documented case reports show that young children exposed to nitrous oxide during anesthesia experience agitation or seizures. - Developmentally immature CNS increases susceptibility to excitatory side effects.  
Answer: C
